coaching.headline: Your best trio game — towers 10–5, objectives 20–15, and Cuban's Sparrow at 1,258 damage/min (well above his 885 norm).
coaching.team: Everything clicked: Cuban hard-carried above his own ceiling, Willy's Steel tanked 2,021 mitigated/min (nearly double his norm) and fed 18 assists, and Xeebs' Gideon over-performed too. Out-towered 10–5 and closed it. This is the version of the trio that climbs — three players above their baselines plus map control.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Nothing — bank it. The combo of Cuban carrying + Willy peeling + map control is your formula.
